zh.Bampton, Tiverton, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文巴普頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Foulques Paynel of Bampton於大約1120年出生在英國戴文巴普頓時，他的父親William de Paynell24歲，母親Juilana Bampton ,heiress27歲。他於大約1155年與Lesceline de Subligny結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1182年在法國諾門迪曼其哈白享年64歲。

zh-hans.Bampton, Tiverton, Devon, England: 英国英格兰戴文巴普頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Foulques Paynel of Bampton于大约1120年出生在英国戴文巴普頓时，他的父亲William de Paynell24岁，母亲Juilana Bampton ,heiress27岁。他于大约1155年与Lesceline de Subligny结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1182年在法国諾門迪曼其哈白享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Paynel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Payne , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Payne
meanings: English: from the Middle English and Old French personal name Pai(e)n, Pagen (from Latin Paganus), a fairly common personal name among Normans. It derived from a word that originally meant ‘villager, rustic’, later ‘heathen’, but it had doubtless lost these connotations in its use as a late medieval personal name. This name has also been established in Ireland since the 14th century.

History: Thomas Payne, who was a freeman of Plymouth Colony in 1639, was the founder of a large American family, which included Robert Treat Paine (1731–1814), one of the signers of the Declaration of Independence. See also   Paine  .

en.lifeSummary: When Foulques Paynel of Bampton was born about 1120, in Bampton, Devon, England, his father, William de Paynell, was 24 and his mother, Juilana Bampton ,heiress, was 27. He married Lesceline de Subligny about 1155. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1182, in Hambye, Manche, Normandy, France, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Foulques Paynel of Bampton est né environ 1120, à Bampton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, William de Paynell, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Juilana Bampton ,heiress, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Lesceline de Subligny environ 1155. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1182, à Hambye, Manche, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Foulques Paynel of Bampton um 1120 in Bampton, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Paynell 24 und seine Mutter Juilana Bampton ,heiress 27. Er hat um 1155 Lesceline de Subligny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1182 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Hambye, Manche, Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Foulques Paynel of Bampton è nato il circa 1120 nel Bampton, Devon, England, il suo padre, William de Paynell, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Juilana Bampton ,heiress, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Lesceline de Subligny circa 1155. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1182, nel Hambye, Manche, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Foulques Paynel of Bamptonが約1120年にイギリスデボンバンプトンで生まれた時，父William de Paynellは24歳，母Juilana Bampton ,heiressは27歳であった。約1155年にLesceline de Sublignyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1182年にフランスノーマンディマンチェハンブイで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Foulques Paynel of Bampton(이)가 대략 1120년 영국 데폰 바프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Paynell(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Juilana Bampton ,heiress(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1155년 Lesceline de Subligny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1182년 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 햄비에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Foulques Paynel of Bampton nasceu aproximadamente 1120, em Bampton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Paynell, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Juilana Bampton ,heiress, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Lesceline de Subligny aproximadamente 1155. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1182, em Hambye, Manche, Normandie, França, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Foulques Paynel of Bampton родился около 1120 г. в местности бамптон, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Paynell было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Juilana Bampton ,heiress, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Lesceline de Subligny около 1155 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1182 г. в местности хамби, манч, норманди, Франция в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Foulques Paynel of Bampton nació aproximadamente 1120, en Bampton, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Paynell, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Juilana Bampton ,heiress, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Lesceline de Subligny aproximadamente 1155. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1182, en Hambye, Manche, Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 64 años.
